name: NovaStore
releaseNotes: Adds a compatibility guard for legacy NovaStore 0.1.x package migration. Modern clients hide the old com.novastore.client bridge entry, while the public catalog keeps that bridge available so old installs can update to the final old-package build instead of seeing the modern package as a separate weather-icon row.
description: NovaStore is Tony's private Android app store for signed APK releases hosted on GitHub. It shows trusted app listings, checks installed versions, verifies catalog signatures plus APK hashes, and hands installs or updates to Android with normal user approval.
